title: Now Recruiting: Language & Reading Study
description: We are looking for children ages 5–10 for our new reading comprehension study. Sessions are 45 minutes and can be done in person or online.

title: Duckling Lab at BUCLD 2024
description: Members of the lab presented new findings on bilingual sentence processing at the Boston University Conference on Language Development.

title: New Paper on Sentence Processing
description: Our latest findings on how bilingual children process complex sentences have been accepted for publication in Language Acquisition.

title: Welcome to Our New Research Assistants
description: We are thrilled to welcome three new undergraduate research assistants to the Duckling Lab this semester.

title: RA Positions Open for Spring 2024
description: We are looking for enthusiastic undergraduate RAs to join the lab in the spring semester. No prior experience required.

title: Lab Founded at Boston University
description: The Duckling Lab officially opens at Boston University's Department of Linguistics under the direction of Dr. Anthony Yacovone.
